owm_init.tooltip: Initialize OpenWeatherMap service, requires an API key

owm_set_units.tooltip: Set the unit system for temperature and wind speed

owm_set_language.tooltip: Set the language of weather descriptions

owm_get_weather_by_city.message0: Weather %1 request city weather city %2 country code %3
owm_get_weather_by_city.tooltip: Request current weather data by city name

owm_get_weather_by_coords.message0: Weather %1 request weather by coordinates lat %2 lon %3
owm_get_weather_by_coords.tooltip: Request current weather data by latitude and longitude

owm_request_success.tooltip: Check if the last weather request was successful

owm_get_forecast.message0: Weather %1 request forecast lat %2 lon %3 count %4

owm_get_forecast_by_city.message0: Weather %1 request city forecast city %2 country code %3 count %4

owm_forecast_request_success.tooltip: Check if the last forecast request was successful

owm_forecast_count.tooltip: Get the number of time points in forecast data

owm_forecast_data.tooltip: Get forecast data for a specific time point (index starts from 0)

owm_get_air_pollution.message0: Weather %1 request air quality lat %2 lon %3
owm_get_air_pollution.tooltip: Request current air pollution data for a location

owm_air_pollution_request_success.tooltip: Check if the last air pollution request was successful

owm_aqi_description.tooltip: Convert Air Quality Index (1-5) to description text

owm_get_coords_by_city.message0: Weather %1 get city coordinates city %2 country code %3
owm_get_coords_by_city.tooltip: Request geographic coordinates by city name

owm_get_coords_by_zip.message0: Weather %1 get zip coordinates zip %2 country code %3
owm_get_coords_by_zip.tooltip: Request geographic coordinates by postal code

owm_get_location_by_coords.tooltip: Request location info by latitude and longitude

owm_geo_request_success.tooltip: Check if the last geocoding request was successful

owm_get_icon_url.tooltip: Get weather icon URL from icon code

owm_get_last_error.tooltip: Get the error message of the last operation

owm_get_http_code.tooltip: Get the HTTP response code of the last request
